name: @gyga-browser/webmcp-browser-automation-kit
description: Reusable WebMCP Chrome extension, gateway, and agent skill kit for browser automation.

scripts.install:claude: npm run setup && node scripts/install-agent.mjs claude
scripts.install:codex: npm run setup && node scripts/install-agent.mjs codex
scripts.install:copilot: npm run setup && node scripts/install-agent.mjs copilot
scripts.install:antigravity: npm run setup && node scripts/install-agent.mjs antigravity
scripts.install:cursor: npm run setup && node scripts/install-agent.mjs cursor
